104-10179-10022 2025 RELEASE UNDER THE PRESIDENT JOHN F. KENNEDY ASSASSINATION RECORDS ACT OF 1992
PRITY DIR INFO MASH CITE HAVA 5939
i. Imco-os ieg21P s,st i Nov rr is onugs'
1. [NICOLAS MENDOZA] TOLD HAVA STA 17 NOV THAT HIS BROTHER
IGIAcIo AAE N:oT LEF HA As LtiD. INACIO NO PLANS RENIAIN
IGNACIO HAD NOT LEFT HAVA AS PLANNED. IGNACIO NOW PLANS REMAIN
AV FA1 IRE DAYS IN HOP E AY O3TAIN PEPMISIION CUS3AN
HAVA FEW MORE DAYS IN HOPE HE MAY OBTAIN PERMISSION CUBAN
c/S Co:N: ecNcERio] yENo] COMiNG HiAI 12 sEPT.
C/S COMMENT: CONCERNED [MENDOZA] COMING MIAMI 12 SEPT.
